channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: UAE to leave OPEC and OPEC+ oil producer groups

Matched Titles:

- OPEC loses key member: Will the oil bloc survive?

- 'Empowered': UAE's exit from Opec appeases Trump, delivers blow to Saudi Arabia

- OPEC to have smaller influence on global oil prices after UAE withdrawal
